elements.label: Earth
elements.direction: Structure priorities and act on one useful step at a time.
elements.lectureTemplate: Consolidation day: return to concrete tasks, organize, then move steadily.

elements.label: Water
elements.direction: Slow down to clarify essentials and protect your energy.
elements.lectureTemplate: Inner-focus day: listen to weak signals, choose the most accurate direction.

elements.label: Wood
elements.direction: Turn tension into concrete direction and clear decisions.
elements.lectureTemplate: Opening day: convert impulse into a clear trajectory.

elements.label: Fire
elements.direction: Name what really matters and share it with sobriety.
elements.lectureTemplate: Radiance day: let the heart speak without dispersion.

elements.label: Metal
elements.direction: Cut noise, keep only what supports the main direction.
elements.lectureTemplate: Discernment day: simplify to gain calm power.
